---
title: "Inference Optimization"
comments: false
toc: false
---

<p class="project-page-intro">
Techniques for improving serving latency, throughput, memory efficiency,
time-to-first-token, and sustained decode performance.
</p>

<div class="project-stack">
  <!-- Add Quantization GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Quantization</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">FP8, INT8, INT4, AWQ/GPTQ-style compression, and accuracy-performance tradeoffs</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add KV Cache Optimization GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">KV Cache Optimization</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Paged KV blocks, reuse across requests, offloading, eviction, MQA, and GQA</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add Prefix Caching GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Prefix Caching</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Automatic prefix reuse for shared prompts and retrieval-heavy workloads</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add Continuous Batching GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Continuous Batching</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Dynamic scheduling for mixed prefill/decode workloads and higher GPU utilization</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add Speculative Decoding GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Speculative Decoding</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Draft-and-verify decoding, EAGLE-style methods, and acceptance-rate tuning</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add Disaggregated Serving GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Disaggregated Serving</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Separating prefill and decode paths for scalable, latency-aware inference</span>
  </a>
</div>
